user.title: Siemens OZW672
user.description:
If you need help with the configuration have a look here: https://github.com/johnaherninfotrack/homeassistant_custom_siemensozw672
NOTE: If you require HTTP, please ensure it is enabled in the device:
 Home > 0.x OZW672.xx > Settings > Communication > Services

device.title: Siemens OZW672 - Device Selection
device.description: Only devices with 'State: Generated' will be displayed here

data.use_device_longname: Use Address+Type as device card name (e.g. "0.1 RVS41.813/109"; does not affect entity_id)
data.prefix_with_function: Prefix entities with Function? (eg "RVS43.345/109->DHW - Legionella function")
data.prefix_with_opline: Prefix entities with Operating Line Number? (eg "1640 Legionella function")

mainmenu.title: Siemens OZW672 - Main Menu
mainmenu.description: Please chose the Menu Item(s) you wish to discover

data.menuitems: Select one or more Menu Items

submenu.title: Siemens OZW672 - Menu: {item_name}
submenu.description: Select the Menu Items and/or Data Points to monitor

data.menuitems: Select one or more Submenu Items
data.datapoints: Select one or more Data Points

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance is allowed.

data.use_device_longname: Use Address+Type as device card name (does not affect entity_id)

add_datapoints_menu.title: Siemens OZW672 - Add Data Points - Menu Selection
add_datapoints_menu.description: Select the menu from which you want to add data points

data.menuitems: Select one or more Menu Items

add_datapoints_submenu.title: Siemens OZW672 - Add Data Points - Menu: {item_name}
add_datapoints_submenu.description: Select the Menu Items and/or Data Points to add

data.menuitems: Select one or more Submenu Items
data.datapoints: Select one or more Data Points

remove_datapoints.title: Siemens OZW672 - Remove Data Points
remove_datapoints.description: Select the data points you want to remove ({count} available)

data.datapoints_to_remove: Select one or more Data Points to remove

add_energy_datapoints.title: Siemens OZW672 - Add Energy Data Points
add_energy_datapoints.description: Select the data points you want to add as energy ({count} available, {energy_count} already added)

data.datapoints_to_add: Select one or more Data Points to add

add_energy_datapoints_power.title: Siemens OZW672 - Set Power for Energy Data Points
add_energy_datapoints_power.description: Enter power (W) for each selected data point ({count} data points)

remove_energy_datapoints.title: Siemens OZW672 - Remove Energy Data Points
remove_energy_datapoints.description: Select the energy data points you want to remove ({count} available)

data.energy_datapoints_to_remove: Select one or more Energy Data Points to remove

error.different_device_selected: A different device than the default was selected. To add datapoints from another device, you must create a new config entry for that device.
error.connection_failed: Failed to connect to device. Please check connection and credentials.
error.no_new_items: No new items available to add in this menu.
error.all_datapoints_already_added: All data points are already added as energy.
